# azents-web Conventions

Conventions for `typescript/apps/azents-web/` only. Generic TypeScript rules live in `typescript-conventions.md`.

<!-- BEGIN_TABLE: generated by scripts/generate-conventions-index.py, edits inside will be overwritten -->

| Convention | File |
| --- | --- |
| For browser persistence and browser-state hooks available in Mantine, use `@mantine/hooks` (`useLocalStorage`, `useSessionStorage`, `readLocalStorageValue`, `readSessionStorageValue`, `useHash`, `useDocumentVisibility`, `useDocumentTitle`, `useWindowEvent`, `useColorScheme`) instead of hand-written browser API wrappers. | [browser-persistence-hooks](../conventions/typescript-azents-web/browser-persistence-hooks.md) |
| azents-web uses cookie-based next-intl locale management â€” no `[locale]` URL segments. Detection order is cookie â†’ header â†’ default. Don't add URL-based locale routing here. | [cookie-based-locale](../conventions/typescript-azents-web/cookie-based-locale.md) |
| Use Mantine spacing tokens (`"md"`, `"lg"`) and `rem()` for sizing; use Mantine color CSS variables (`var(--mantine-color-*)`) for colors. Hardcoded `px` values and hex/rgba colors are forbidden in azents-web â€” exception: feature-card accent radial gradients. | [mantine-tokens-no-hardcoded](../conventions/typescript-azents-web/mantine-tokens-no-hardcoded.md) |
| Never create `index.ts` files in azents-web â€” the `check-file/no-index` ESLint rule forbids them. Import directly from the file that defines the symbol (`@/features/home/HomePage` not `@/features/home`). | [no-index-files](../conventions/typescript-azents-web/no-index-files.md) |
| Layer imports flow strictly app â†’ features â†’ shared. `shared/` MUST NOT import from `app/` or `features/`; `features/` MUST NOT import from `app/`. | [no-reverse-layer-imports](../conventions/typescript-azents-web/no-reverse-layer-imports.md) |
| When adding or changing a pure state UI component in azents-web, add colocated Storybook stories for its meaningful states using static fixtures instead of live API calls. | [pure-ui-stories](../conventions/typescript-azents-web/pure-ui-stories.md) |
| Configure azents-web Storybook with @storybook/nextjs-vite and shared decorators that mirror Mantine, next-intl, locale, color mode, and app globals. | [storybook-provider-structure](../conventions/typescript-azents-web/storybook-provider-structure.md) |
| In azents-web, call public API endpoints through generated @azents/public-client functions instead of raw ctx.apiClient HTTP methods or hand-written internal API fetch URLs, so frontend paths stay aligned with OpenAPI. | [use-generated-public-client](../conventions/typescript-azents-web/use-generated-public-client.md) |

<!-- END_TABLE -->
